measurability.reason: No commitments were found for Loss and Damage.

gap_findings.description: Saudi Arabia makes no commitment on loss and damage in its NDC.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: loss and damage is unavoidable even with adaptation; finance mechanisms urgently needed.

gap_findings.description: Saudi Arabia's NDC mentions the need for international cooperation and finance, but does not provide a clear commitment.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: NDC 2: 'We will work with the international community to address the impacts of climate change, including loss and damage.'
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: finance mechanisms urgently needed.

details.summary: Saudi Arabia's NDC commitments are absent on loss and damage, and its conditional dependency on international finance creates delivery risk.
